form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up sat behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 9 at this track Mdn on March 15 over 1000m, slow going 5 len behind Nottington Prince with 53.5kg at $18. Second-up sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 11 at this track Mdn on March 31 over 1200m, on a slow track; 4 len behind She's A Beauty carrying 55kg at $15. Will be harder to beat this time.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 46-day let-up. Most recently tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 8 at this track 3yo Mdn-Sw on February 27 over 1200m, on a slow track; 1.75 len behind Airwaves with 56kg at $6.50. The race before that 2nd of 7 at Home Hill 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on February 14 over 1180m, slow going nose behind Miss Kiyoshi with 56.5kg at $5. Looks tough to beat in this line-up.
